notes.text: Wants callback after Diwali bonus credited. Budget ~2L.
Poocha price kitna hai — sent brochure on WhatsApp.
Asked to never call again. Marked DNC.
Bola budget tight hai abhi, follow up next week.
GST invoice chahiye, comparing with competitor.
Demo scheduled Saturday 11am. Very keen on Hindi bot.

calls.summary: Lead interested in the 2L package, wants callback after Diwali bonus is credited. Asked about EMI options.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste Priya ji, main Lokvera se bol rahi hoon. Kya aapke paas do minute hain?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan boliye, kya offer hai?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Diwali offer ke andar aapko full package 2 lakh mein mil raha hai, EMI bhi available hai.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Interesting. Bonus credit hone ke baad call karna, 6th ke baad.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bilkul, main 6 July ko follow-up schedule kar deti hoon. Dhanyavaad!

calls.summary: No answer after 25 seconds of ringing.
Payment reminder converted — lead paid outstanding ₹48,000 during the call and confirmed onboarding slot.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello Fatima ji, this is a reminder from Lokvera regarding your pending invoice of forty-eight thousand rupees.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Yes yes, I was planning to pay today itself. Can you send the link?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sending the payment link on WhatsApp now. I'll stay on the line while you complete it.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Done, paid. Please confirm.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Payment received, thank you! Your onboarding is confirmed for Monday 10 AM.

calls.summary: Answering machine detected. Voicemail drop delivered.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste, yeh Lokvera ki taraf se call thi. Kripya humein 1800-XXX-XXXX par call karein. Dhanyavaad.

calls.summary: Lead asked for pricing. Brochure sent on WhatsApp. Follow-up scheduled.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning Deepika ji, Lokvera se call kar rahi hoon aapki website enquiry ke baare mein.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan, price kitna hai?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Plans 15,000 se shuru hote hain. Main aapko WhatsApp par brochure bhej deti hoon?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Theek hai, bhej dijiye.

calls.summary: Lead demanded removal from calling list. Marked DNC automatically.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste Vikram ji, main Lokvera se —

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Mujhe dobara call mat karna. Number hata do list se.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ji bilkul, aapka number do-not-call list mein daal diya gaya hai. Asuvidha ke liye khed hai.

calls.summary: Inbound query on EMI plans. Qualified as hot lead — 24-month EMI preferred, callback booked with Rohit.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Hi, I saw your ad. Do you have EMI options?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes Ananya ji! We offer 12, 18 and 24-month EMI plans with zero processing fee this month.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: 24 months mein monthly kitna padega?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: 24 months par approx ₹9,200 per month. Kya main aapke liye senior advisor ke saath call book kar doon?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan, kal shaam ko.

calls.summary: Not interested — already purchased from competitor last month.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste Rafi sahab, Lokvera Diwali offer ke baare mein bataana chahti thi.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Bhai maine pichle mahine hi doosri company se le liya. Not interested.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Koi baat nahi, aapka din shubh ho!

calls.summary: Budget constraints this month. Interested but wants follow-up next week after salary credit.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello Shreya ji, main Lokvera se. Aapne pichhle hafte enquiry ki thi.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan yaad hai. Abhi thoda budget tight hai honestly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Samajh sakti hoon. Kya main next week follow-up kar sakti hoon? Tab tak offer bhi valid rahega.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan theek hai, Tuesday ke baad.

calls.summary: Rang out. Retry scheduled per flow rules.
Long qualification call, transferred warm to Rohit who closed the deal. Converted.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste Lakshmi ji, IndiaMART par aapki requirement dekhi — bulk order ke liye?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Yes, we need around 200 units for our Chennai office.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Main aapko humare senior advisor Rohit se connect karti hoon, ek minute hold kijiye.

transcript.speaker: system
transcript.text: — Warm transfer to Rohit Sharma —

transcript.speaker: rep
transcript.text: Hi Lakshmi ji, Rohit here. Let me put together a bulk quote for 200 units right away.

calls.summary: No answer. Retry attempted next day.
Comparing with competitor. Needs GST invoice and bulk pricing sheet. Sent both.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Suresh bhai, namaste! Lokvera se bol rahi hoon, aapki pichhli enquiry par update dena tha.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Dekho, doosri company 10% kam de rahi hai. GST invoice milega aapse?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bilkul milega. Main abhi GST invoice sample aur bulk pricing sheet WhatsApp kar rahi hoon.

calls.summary: Called back after missed call campaign. Interested in premium plan, demo booked.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Aapki taraf se missed call aaya tha?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ji Neha ji, Diwali campaign ke liye. Premium plan par 30% off chal raha hai. Demo dekhna chahengi?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan, weekend pe time hai.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Saturday 11 baje book kar diya. Calendar invite bhej rahi hoon.

calls.summary: No answer.
AMD triggered, voicemail script dropped.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste, Lokvera se call thi Kavitha ji ke liye. Hum kal phir sampark karenge.

calls.summary: Wrong timing — lead was driving, hung up annoyed.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste Manish ji —

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Gaadi chala raha hoon, baad mein.

calls.summary: Very keen on Hindi voice bot for her clinic. Demo booked Saturday 11 AM with Rohit.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Hi, I run a dental clinic — can your bot handle appointment calls in Hindi?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely! Humara bot Hindi, English aur Hinglish teeno handle karta hai — appointment booking, reminders, sab.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Wow. Demo dikha sakte ho weekend pe?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Saturday 11 AM booked with our advisor Rohit. Aapko confirmation SMS mil jayega.

calls.summary: No answer on first attempt.
Payment collection successful — cleared ₹32,500 pending. Marked converted.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ritu ji namaste, aapka ₹32,500 ka invoice pending hai. Aaj clear karna chahengi?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan, UPI link bhejo.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Link sent. Main line par hoon jab tak payment complete ho.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Ho gaya.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Received! Receipt WhatsApp par aa jayegi. Dhanyavaad Ritu ji.

calls.summary: No answer, retry queued for afternoon.
Confirmed EMI callback — advisor call locked for 5 PM today.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ananya ji, kal ki baat ke follow-up mein — aaj shaam 5 baje advisor call theek rahega?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan perfect, 5 baje.

config.script: This call is from Lokvera and may be recorded.

config.prompt: Greet warmly in Hinglish, mention the Diwali offer, ask if they have 2 minutes.
config.fallback: Namaste! Lokvera se bol rahi hoon.

config.prompt: Politely remind about pending invoice {{amount}}, offer UPI link.
Greet, ask how you can help. Detect language and mirror it.

templates.name: Lead Qualification
templates.description: Qualify inbound/outbound leads on intent, budget and timeline, then hand off hot leads.

templates.name: Appointment Reminder
templates.description: Remind, confirm or reschedule appointments with a single automated call.

templates.name: Payment Collection
templates.description: Chase pending invoices politely and collect over UPI during the call.

config.prompt: Remind about {{amount}} pending, offer UPI link now.

templates.name: Survey / NPS
templates.description: Run a short voice survey and log scores back to the CRM.

templates.name: Cold Outreach
templates.description: First-touch cold calls with AMD handling, retries and voicemail drops.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste! Main Lokvera se bol rahi hoon. Kya aapke paas do minute hain?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan boliye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Humara Diwali offer chal raha hai — premium plan par 30% off. Interested honge?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Price kitna hai?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: 15,000 se shuru. Main WhatsApp par details bhej doon?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Theek hai, bhejo.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste! Main Lokvera se —

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Phir se call?! Kitni baar mana kiya hai!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Maafi chahti hoon. Kya aap chahte hain main aapka number DNC list mein daal doon?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan! Abhi karo!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ho gaya. Aapko dobara call nahi aayega. Asuvidha ke liye khed hai.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste ji! Main Lokvera se bol rahi hoon.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Kaun? Bank se bol rahe ho kya?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Nahi ji, bank se nahi. Lokvera — ek software company. Aapne enquiry ki thi website par.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Website? Beta maine toh kuch nahi kiya... mera pota use karta hai computer.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Koi baat nahi ji. Kya main shaam ko call karoon jab aapke pote ghar par hon?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan haan, 6 baje ke baad.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste! Main Lokvera se bol rahi hoon.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Aiyyo, yenna? Konjam slow-a pesunga... Hindi konjam konjam therium.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem! I'll switch to English. We have a special offer on our premium plan this month.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Ah okay okay. Price evlo... how much it is?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Starting fifteen thousand rupees. Shall I send details on WhatsApp?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Seri, send pannunga.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste! Main Lokvera se bol rahi hoon. Kya aapke paas do minute hain?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello? Kya aap sun paa rahe hain?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Lagta hai network issue hai. Main baad mein call karti hoon. Dhanyavaad!

transcript.speaker: system
transcript.text: — Silence timeout reached, call ended by flow rule —

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste! Main Lokvera —

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan haan pata hai, jaldi bolo kya hai.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Diwali offer — premium plan par —

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Price? Sirf price bolo.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: 15,000 se shuru.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Mehenga hai. 10 mein doge?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Main aapke liye special discount check karke WhatsApp par bhejti hoon.

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Theek hai bye.

notifications.text: Diwali Campaign Line flagged 'At Risk' — spam score rising
Pooja Bhatt booked a demo for Saturday 11 AM
Payment Collector recovered ₹32,500 from Ritu Agarwal
Credit balance below ₹5,000 — top up soon
